subject: Relion 4.0 to M starfile conversion
body:
Hi

I was trying to process apoferritin in M which was auto-refined in Relion 
4.0. So I converted the columns rlnOriginXAngstroms to rlnOriginX and Y, Z 
too. Then, I  specified 1.0A/px for the shifts. But M told me Star files 
didn't contain all essential columns. How can I solve this problem?

_rlnCoordinateX #1 

_rlnCoordinateY #2 

_rlnCoordinateZ #3 

_rlnMicrographName #4 

_rlnCtfMaxResolution #5 

_rlnImageName #6 

_rlnCtfImage #7 

_rlnAngleRot #8 

_rlnAngleTilt #9 

_rlnAnglePsi #10 

_rlnPixelSize #11 

_rlnOpticsGroup #12 

_rlnGroupNumber #13 

_rlnOriginX #14 

_rlnOriginY #15 

_rlnOriginZ #16 

_rlnClassNumber #17 

_rlnNormCorrection #18 

_rlnRandomSubset #19 

_rlnLogLikeliContribution #20 

_rlnMaxValueProbDistribution #21 

_rlnNrOfSignificantSamples #22

Thank you

Min-gyu
